violations.description: General food protection. — --Potentially hazardous food was not stored at proper temperature of 41 or less. *Whipped cream cheese in make table found with temperature of 44F at bottom and 45-48F at top of table.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Multiple scoop laying with handles in coffee powders.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Salad scoop in hand sink basin upon arrival. *COS staff took to dish sink while on-site.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Handles of scoops laying in coffee powders.

Reheating food. — ---Commercial soup was heating in crock pot, found with a temp range of 32F to 125F and had been placed into crock pot approximately one hour ago. *Product is a boil in the bag item with a reheat instruction requirement of 185F. *Recommended using the roaster with temperature dial adjustment for cooking/heating soups.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Shelf above dish pit is worn and pitted. -Tape used to secure door handle on upright tan freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Residue at interior of all blender pitchers-below blender blades. Some limescale/debris at pitcher lids.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Air fryer has heavy residue at interior surfaces/catch tray. Appears to have been left dirty after use.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Some frost at interior surfaces of all 3 chest freezers (worst at center freezer). -Limescale/residue at drain board and dish drainers.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
